prompt.rubric_source: karpathy/jobs 0-10 scale, calibrated for Japan jobtag

anchors.2-3: Low: mostly physical or interpersonal work
anchors.4-5: Moderate: mix of physical and knowledge work
anchors.6-7: High: knowledge work with human judgment/relationships
anchors.10: Maximum: fully routine digital information processing

caveat: Rough LLM estimates. High score does not predict job disappearance — many high-exposure jobs will be reshaped, not replaced. Score reflects how much AI will reshape the work.
